data.reasoning:
The bullish thesis remains intact with high conviction (0.85). NVDA's fundamentals are exceptionally strong: 65% YoY revenue growth, 59% Data Center growth, dominant market position in AI infrastructure with Blackwell architecture, impressive margin expansion (74.9% gross margin), and 142% operating income growth in Compute Networking. The stock is up 1.7% today on solid volume (73 bars), reflecting healthy momentum. 

While gap risk is present overnight, it is manageable at MEDIUM level given: (1) no new negative catalysts or evidence since last decision, (2) strong institutional support for AI mega-cap positioning, (3) the bullish thesis on accelerated computing demand remains valid. Customer concentration risk and $22.7B future lease obligations are known structural issues already priced into valuation and do not warrant tactical exit.

The modest 1.7% daily gain suggests measured accumulation rather than euphoric breakout, supporting conviction to hold through the overnight period rather than reduce exposure. Market liquidity for NVDA remains exceptional, reducing gap risk vs. typical equities.
